_comment: Loaded ON TOP of data/*.json. Match an existing id to rename/override it; use a new id to add content. Homebrew always wins.

spells.name: Arcane Darts
spells._note: Only 'name' is given, so everything else about Magic Missile is inherited unchanged. Every class that references 'magic-missile' now shows it as 'Arcane Darts'.

spells.name: Starlight Bolt
spells.desc: A lance of cold starlight; radiant damage and the target sheds dim light until your next turn.

species.name: Aarakocra
species.desc: Birdfolk who take to the sky with ease.
